svg.title: Paracosm system flow: world source to forked futures
svg.desc: A vertical flow diagram of the Paracosm pipeline. Prompts, briefs, URLs, PDFs, or JSON drafts feed into the Scenario Compiler, producing a typed ScenarioPackage. A deterministic seeded kernel and the Runtime Orchestrator run a per-turn pipeline of Director, Departments, Commander, and Reactions, with side modules for runtime tool forging in a V8 sandbox, an LLM judge, HEXACO personality drift, and AgentMemory. The result is an agent swarm of personality-typed cells and a Zod-validated RunArtifact that can be replayed byte-for-byte or forked at any past turn.

g.text: From a paragraph to a forkable, replayable, multi-agent world.
LLM-generated runtime hooks · validated against DraftScenarioSchema
Typed contract · Zod-validated · cached to disk
turn pipeline · every structured LLM call Zod-validated with retry-with-feedback
personality-typed cells · HEXACO + mood + family + memory + role
trajectory · decisions · fingerprint · forgedTools · citations · finalSwarm · cost
BRANCH B · different seed / custom event
All structured LLM calls Zod-validated · retry-with-feedback · prompt-cache discounted from turn 2
